extDescription.message: Extract the main content of the current page, convert it to Markdown, and copy it to the clipboard.

commandClipActiveTabDescription.message: Copy the current page as Markdown

optionsDescription.message: Click the extension icon or use the shortcut to copy the current page as Markdown. On this page, you can change the clip output options.

optionsHint.message: If both are off, links and images are converted to plain body text as much as possible.

optionsHowToClickIcon.message: Click the extension icon in the toolbar to copy the current page.
